title: CAT Intent Envelope
description: Normalized capture of a user/system goal entering the Chromatic Atomic Tower pipeline at stage 1 (Intent).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the intent was captured.

raw_text.description: Original goal or trigger text, unmodified.

parsed_goal.description: Normalized one-line goal derived from raw_text.

constraints.description: Optional list of constraints or guard-rails for this intent.

proposed_mission_id.description: Mission ID proposed for this intent, or null if not yet assigned.

trigger.description: What initiated the intent (e.g. a specific event, cron, or user action).
